---
title: "test_pennyone_security.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/empire_tests/test_pennyone_security.ts"
loc: 23
complexity: 1
logic_score: 8.30
style_score: 3.95
intel_score: 4.88
overall_score: 5.71
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix. It exists to support the broader ecosystem of system telemetry. Its role in the system is to provide foundational operational logic.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 1 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [*](file://node:assert)
- [registry](file://../../src/tools/pennyone/pathRegistry.js)

### Exports
- `p1`
- `p2`
- `source`
- `resolved`
